name: Machi Komacine
description:
__Height:__ 159 cm 

Not known to show much emotion, Machi seems to be one of the coldest members of the Phantom Troupe. The only person she has shown some feeling towards was Chrollo. Hisoka seems to have an occasional interest with her, although it's hard to see whether it's genuine, given Hisoka's unpredictability. Machi also doesn't appear to be interested in him, spurning his advances on all occasions. Machi is one of the Phantom Troupe that originated from Meteor City.  

__Nen Ability:__ 
Machi's nen transforms into thin wispy-long threads in which she uses in a variety of ways, including seaming together old wounds to heal them, repairing back dislodged limbs and forming a noose that can strangle enemies with a tug. Her thread's strength is inversely proportional to the length. The longer the thread she makes, the easier it is to break. ~!She uses her nen ability on Hisoka after his duel in Heavens Arena.!~
